name: traintrack
description: Multi-agent coordination for coding agents — spawn worker agents, delegate tasks, and collect results over a local channel.

interface.shortDescription: Spawn and coordinate worker agents from a lead agent
interface.longDescription: Traintrack gives your agent team-lead superpowers: spawn workers, delegate tasks, collect results, and synthesize — all over a local SQLite channel. Add the MCP server manually so Codex can use the traintrack tools (see README).
defaultPrompt: Spawn a team to implement this feature in parallel.
Delegate the backend and frontend to separate workers.
